summary: A clip from a Fox News split-screen interview. A man with a beard in a dark suit speaks on the left, labeled in the lower-third MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY, while the right shows a live shot of the U.S. Capitol dome marked CAPITOL HILL. The banner reads STILL SHUT DOWN, DHS REMAINS UNFUNDED BY CONGRESS FOR MORE THAN 2 MONTHS.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit speaks beside a live shot of the Capitol; lower-third reads MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY.
The interview continues with the banner STILL SHUT DOWN, DHS REMAINS UNFUNDED BY CONGRESS FOR MORE THAN 2 MONTHS.

notable_text: MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY; CAPITOL HILL; STILL SHUT DOWN; DHS REMAINS UNFUNDED BY CONGRESS FOR MORE THAN 2 MONTHS
